rationale: The US-Iran ceasefire is confirmed but questions and risks remain per BBC — no qualitative leap beyond the already-raised baseline; oil price slide continues as expected.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal confirmed but questions and risks remain; peace deal signing expected Friday
top_events.summary: Ceasefire holds and oil prices continue sliding, benefiting Polish energy costs, but BBC highlights unresolved risks — no new qualitative leap beyond last cycle's baseline.

top_events.title: G7 summit protests in Geneva
top_events.summary: Clashes ahead of G7 in Geneva are minor background noise for Poland — no direct policy or security impact on Polish residents.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large bilateral trade deal between UK and Japan has negligible direct impact on Polish daily life.
